text.title: Puppeteer Output Capture (Screenshots, PDFs, HAR) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for puppeteer-output-capture.

conclusion.verdict: type=jpeg quality=80; PNG only with explicit justification
PNG OK for one-off debug; lossy still acceptable
pipe HAR through scrubber before any persistence

text.example: output_type=pdf → waitForSelector('[data-testid=invoice-total]') + document.fonts.ready + printBackground=true; bounded path /tmp/agent-run/job-42/invoice.pdf. Rule: pdf-after-render.
